issues.title: Enemy damage spike on floor 21 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 41 damage in a single enemy turn when player had 43 HP (95.3% of current HP)
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for single hits

issues.title: Enemy damage spike on floor 21 encounter 2

issues.title: 17 consecutive easy encounters (floors 1-6)
issues.description: Player maintained >90 HP across 17 consecutive encounters from floor 1 enc 0 to floor 6 enc 1. HP values: [100, 100, 100, 100, 98, 93, 95, 96, 91, 100, 100, 100, 98, 98, 100, 100, 100]
reproductionSteps: Observe lack of challenge — player never drops below 90 HP
issues.suggestedFix: Increase enemy damage or HP in early/mid floors to create more tension

issues.title: Player defeated despite 89.0% accuracy
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 21 with 89.0% overall accuracy (782 correct, 97 wrong). High accuracy should yield better survivability.
reproductionSteps: Play through full run with high accuracy
Observe that good play still results in defeat
issues.suggestedFix: Increase healing from correct answers or reduce enemy damage scaling in later floors

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 2 encounter 2 (crystal_guardian)
issues.description: Encounter took 4 turns to resolve, but the previous floor (1) averaged 1.7 turns. This is a 2.4x spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Review crystal_guardian stats — HP or damage may be disproportionately high for floor 2
